headline: Costco (COST) Brings Laifen Hair Dryer To Stores In Its Biggest US Retail Push
summary: Laifen has introduced its SE High-Speed Hair Dryer at select Costco warehouse locations in the U.S. The rollout marks Laifen's largest U.S. retail expansion so far and expands Costco's premium health and beauty lineup. The product was previously focused on direct-to-consumer channels and is now available to Costco members in store. For Costco Wholesale (NasdaqGS:COST), the Laifen launch adds another premium product to a membership model that already attracts a wide range of shoppers. The...
